L1.head: Controlled deligandation strategy
L1.claim: 脱配体策略优化Q-MOFs结构增强催化活性

L1.head: Enhanced catalytic activity
L1.claim: 催化活性提升促进肿瘤微环境芬顿反应

L1.head: Fenton reaction efficiency
L1.claim: 芬顿反应增强导致活性氧大量生成

L1.head: ROS production
L1.claim: 活性氧积累诱导肿瘤细胞铁死亡

L1.head: Q-MOFs porous structure
L1.claim: 多孔结构促进与肿瘤微环境物质交换

L1.head: Tumor microenvironment interaction
L1.claim: 微环境相互作用激活免疫原性细胞死亡

L1.head: Immunogenic cell death
L1.claim: 免疫原性死亡触发抗肿瘤免疫应答

L2.head: Controlled deligandation
L2.claim: 脱配体策略改变金属离子配位结构

L2.head: Altered coordination environment
L2.claim: 配位环境改变增强过氧化物酶样活性

L2.head: Enhanced peroxidase activity
L2.claim: 催化活性提升导致活性氧高效生成

L2.head: Q-MOFs porous structure
L2.claim: 多孔结构促进活性氧局部富集

L2.head: ROS accumulation
L2.claim: 活性氧积累触发铁死亡程序

L2.head: Ferroptosis
L2.claim: 铁死亡导致肿瘤细胞失活

L3.head: Deligandation-induced pore optimization
L3.claim: 孔结构优化提升治疗剂滞留能力

L3.head: Therapeutic agent retention
L3.claim: 药物滞留促进活性氧缓释

L3.head: Sustained ROS release
L3.claim: 持续释放增强免疫原性死亡效应

L3.head: Q-MIL-53(Fe)
L3.claim: 材料促进树突状细胞成熟

L3.head: PD-1 antibody
L3.claim: 抗体阻断T细胞抑制信号

L3.head: Combined therapy
L3.claim: 联合治疗协同增强肿瘤消退
